sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n12232" key="a)pneh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπνεής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, corrupt in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.420</biblScope> </bibl> as epith. of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πῦρ</foreign> (metaph. of love).</entryFree>
